name: Margaret Chua

background.family: Widow, lives with her only daughter who is working full-time
background.personality: Generally cheerful, but becoming more quiet and withdrawn due to memory concerns
background.living_situation: Lives with only child, her daughter. Daughter leaves her alone at home when she works, but remains with her all the time on weekends.

medical_history.diagnosis: Mild Cognitive Impairment progressing to early-stage vascular dementia
medical_history.medications: Glucosamine, Furosemide, Tolbutamide, Enalapril, Actrapid, Insulatard  multivitamins
medical_history.other_conditions: Osteoarthritis, High blood pressure, Poorly-controlled Type II diabetes

current_concerns: Difficulty remembering how to use telephone
Worry about being a burden to daughter
Worried she is not 'all right' as she recognizes forgetfulness

name: Gopal Ramakrishnan

background.family: Divorced, two children (only one surviving), two grandchildren
background.personality: Used to be very organized and detail-oriented, now often frustrated by confusion, forgetfulness. This gets him agitated often
background.living_situation: Lives at home with son who is primary caregiver. Son has quit his job to remain full-time, resulting in resentment, frustration at his father

current_concerns: Wanders around the house at night

name: Rosmah Wati

background.family: Widow, four children, eight grandchildren, two great-grandchildren
background.interests: Used to love cooking elaborate meals
background.personality: Was very nurturing and caring, now mostly quiet but sometimes agitated
background.living_situation: Lives with oldest daughter who is frail as well. Has a live-in domestic helper to assist with daily care.

medical_history.diagnosis: Severe Alzheimer's disease with behavioral symptoms
medical_history.other_conditions: Difficulty swallowing, mobility issues, occasional seizures

current_concerns: Needs assistance with all daily activities
Sometimes becomes agitated for unknown reasons
